creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
Update to 0.7.2, somehow tidy Makefile according to portlint. 

PS. I detest INSTALLS_ICONS as it pulls in lots of really unneeded dependencies, just because port happens to install few icons. How it could be correctly handled? 

Make config option would be somewhat overkill, if using it then converting to full optionng would be in order for docs (PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS) as well. 

Frankly, I consider what is now lest obtrusive... I've regenerated pkg-plist with ports-mgmt/pkg-plist not sure if this is correct way, I do not have experience with such massive plist.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
